name: plan
description: Toggle planning mode from the Finch Composer toolbar.
systemPrompt: When the user wants to plan before acting, or break down a task before execution, suggest using Plan Mode.
toast.enter.title: Think before you act
toast.enter.desc: Finch will only output a plan. Confirm after each reply to execute.
toast.exit.title: No planning
toast.home.enter.desc: Next message will be sent in planning mode and auto-closes after sending.
toast.home.exit.title: No planning
confirm.label: Execute
execute.prompt: Plan confirmed, please start executing according to the plan above.
